headline: LKQ Corp (NASDAQ:LKQ) Rises on Revenue Beat and Strategic Review Despite Q1 Earnings Miss
summary: LKQ Corp beat Q1 2026 revenue estimates at $3.47B but missed EPS forecasts. Shares rose 1.1% pre-market after the board initiated a strategic review of alternatives, including a potential sale.

headline: LKQ Q1 Adj. EPS $0.67 Misses $0.68 Estimate, Sales $3.469B Beat $3.390B Estimate
